organization: HDFC ERGO General Insurance Company Limited

benefits.name: Hospitalization Expenses
benefits.description: Indemnity for medical expenses incurred during hospitalization due to illness or injury.

benefits.name: Domiciliary Hospitalization
benefits.description: Indemnity for medical expenses incurred during domiciliary hospitalization prescribed by a medical practitioner.

benefits.name: AYUSH Treatment
benefits.description: Indemnity for medical expenses incurred for inpatient treatment in AYUSH hospitals.

benefits.name: Pre-Hospitalization Medical Expenses
benefits.description: Indemnity for medical expenses incurred up to 60 days prior to hospitalization.

benefits.name: Post-Hospitalization Medical Expenses
benefits.description: Indemnity for medical expenses incurred up to 180 days after discharge from the hospital.

benefits.name: Organ Donor Expenses
benefits.description: Indemnity for medical expenses incurred for the organ donor's hospitalization for harvesting the donated organ.

benefits.name: Emergency Air Ambulance
benefits.description: Indemnity for expenses incurred for air ambulance transportation for emergency care.

exclusions.name: Pre-Existing Diseases
exclusions.description: Expenses related to the treatment of a pre-existing disease and its direct complications are excluded until the expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage.

exclusions.name: Specified Disease/Procedure Waiting Period
exclusions.description: Expenses related to the treatment of specified conditions or surgeries are excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage.

exclusions.name: 30-day Waiting Period
exclusions.description: Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first Policy commencement date shall be excluded except claims arising due to an accident.

exclusions.name: Cosmetic or Plastic Surgery
exclusions.description: Expenses for cosmetic or plastic surgery or any treatment to change appearance unless for reconstruction following an Accident, Burn(s) or Cancer.

exclusions.name: Hazardous or Adventure Sports
exclusions.description: Expenses related to any treatment including but not limited to, para-jumping, rock climbing, mountaineering, rafting, motor racing.

exclusions.name: Breach of Law
exclusions.description: Expenses for treatment directly arising from or consequent to any breach of law.

exclusions.name: Excluded Providers
exclusions.description: Expenses incurred towards treatment in any hospital not recognized by the insurer.

exclusions.name: Treatment for Alcoholism, Drug or Substance Abuse
exclusions.description: Expenses related to treatment for alcoholism, drug or substance abuse or any addictive condition.

exclusions.name: Investigative Treatments
exclusions.description: Expenses related to investigative treatments for sleep-apnoea, general debility or exhaustion.

exclusions.name: Vaccination
exclusions.description: Expenses related to vaccination including inoculation and immunisations except post animal bite treatment.

exclusions.name: Non-Medical Expenses
exclusions.description: Expenses for non-medical items such as food charges, laundry charges, attendant charges, etc.

exclusions.name: Outpatient Treatment
exclusions.description: Expenses related to treatment taken on an outpatient basis.

exclusions.name: Unproven Treatments
exclusions.description: Expenses related to any unproven treatment, services and supplies for or in connection with any treatment.

exclusions.name: Sterility and Infertility
exclusions.description: Expenses related to sterility and infertility treatments.
